subject: The nature of the Fermi/GBM trigger 160523919 is unknown.
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

The nature of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 485733821/160523919
at 22:03:37.13 UT on 23 May 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB, can not be verified.
